_meta.doctrine: Local-first ephemeral cybersecurity-hardened AI swarm cluster

workstreams.name: Seal Ephemeral Swarm Doctrine
workstreams.description: Define and seal the doctrine that all agents/workers run as ephemeral processes: no persistent state outside approved storage, no credentials in env vars, no long-lived execution tokens. Produces northstar_doctrine.md artifact.

workstreams.name: Skill Registry Runtime Gate
workstreams.description: Enforce that agent skill routing is validated at runtime against an approved skill registry, not just conceptually routed. Skills not in registry are blocked before execution.

workstreams.name: Asset Trust Registry
workstreams.description: Build a static trust-tier model for each cluster node: MacBook Pro (CONTROL PLANE), Dell (EDGE WORKER), NEO (INFERENCE NODE), iPad (SECONDARY MONITOR), iPhone (EMERGENCY CONSOLE). Each tier gets approved capabilities and denied capabilities.

workstreams.name: Port Hardening + LAN Approval Gate
workstreams.description: Audit all LAN-exposed ports. Require explicit operator approval for any service reachable beyond localhost. Block unapproved ports via firewall policy documented in config.

workstreams.name: QA Evidence Matrix
workstreams.description: Create a unified matrix mapping each QA test → control → evidence artifact → remediation status. Replaces scattered per-batch evidence files with a single source of truth.

workstreams.name: PERT Dashboard UI
workstreams.description: Surface the PERT workstream graph, critical path, and ETA in the Governance Cockpit → Production Readiness panel. Each workstream must show truth-state label.

workstreams.name: Google Drive Default Storage Policy
workstreams.description: Define and enforce the policy: all swarm output artifacts default to local ephemeral storage first, then are pushed to Google Drive on mission completion. No credentials stored in repo.

workstreams.name: Cluster Worker Profiles: Mac/Dell/NEO/iPad/iPhone
workstreams.description: Define hardware profiles, capability tiers, approved workload types, and resource limits for each cluster node. Stored in config/cluster_worker_profiles.json and surfaced in UI.

workstreams.name: End-to-End Audit Run
workstreams.description: Execute a full end-to-end audit run across all workstreams P2–P8. Produce a signed production readiness report. This is the final Go/No-Go gate.
